'''thodhachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubilant|jubilant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubilant|jubilant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thodhachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhachithi|thodhachithi]] || [[word:thodhachiji|thodhachiji]] || [[word:thodhachishi|thodhachishi]] || [[word:thodhachiki|thodhachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhachuthuthu|thodhachuthuthu]] || [[word:thodhachujuju|thodhachujuju]] || [[word:thodhachushushu|thodhachushushu]] || [[word:thodhachukuku|thodhachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachuthu|thodhachuthu]] || [[word:thodhachuju|thodhachuju]] || [[word:thodhachushu|thodhachushu]] || [[word:thodhachuku|thodhachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachufthuf|thodhachufthuf]] || [[word:thodhachufjuf|thodhachufjuf]] || [[word:thodhachufshuf|thodhachufshuf]] || [[word:thodhachufkuf|thodhachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhachethe|thodhachethe]] || [[word:thodhacheje|thodhacheje]] || [[word:thodhacheshe|thodhacheshe]] || [[word:thodhacheke|thodhacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhachothotho|thodhachothotho]] || [[word:thodhachojojo|thodhachojojo]] || [[word:thodhachoshosho|thodhachoshosho]] || [[word:thodhachokoko|thodhachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachotho|thodhachotho]] || [[word:thodhachojo|thodhachojo]] || [[word:thodhachosho|thodhachosho]] || [[word:thodhachoko|thodhachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachofthof|thodhachofthof]] || [[word:thodhachofjof|thodhachofjof]] || [[word:thodhachofshof|thodhachofshof]] || [[word:thodhachofkof|thodhachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|thodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thodhachĂŠthĂŠ|thodhachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhachĂŠjĂŠ|thodhachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhachĂŠshĂŠ|thodhachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thodhachĂŠkĂŠ|thodhachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thodhachathatha|thodhachathatha]] || [[word:thodhachajaja|thodhachajaja]] || [[word:thodhachashasha|thodhachashasha]] || [[word:thodhachakaka|thodhachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachatha|thodhachatha]] || [[word:thodhachaja|thodhachaja]] || [[word:thodhachasha|thodhachasha]] || [[word:thodhachaka|thodhachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachafthaf|thodhachafthaf]] || [[word:thodhachafjaf|thodhachafjaf]] || [[word:thodhachafshaf|thodhachafshaf]] || [[word:thodhachafkaf|thodhachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thodhachasha|thodhachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhachshĂ«sha|thodhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhachrosha|thodhachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhachmusha|thodhachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhachyasha|thodhachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhachnkshĂ«sha|gothodhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhachnkrosha|gothodhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhachnkmusha|gothodhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhachnkyasha|gothodhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thodhadhachasha|thodhadhachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhadhachshĂ«sha|thodhadhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhadhachrosha|thodhadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhadhachmusha|thodhadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhadhachyasha|thodhadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhadhachnkshĂ«sha|gothodhadhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhadhachnkrosha|gothodhadhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhadhachnkmusha|gothodhadhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhadhachnkyasha|gothodhadhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thedhĂŠchasha|thedhĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thedhĂŠchshĂ«sha|thedhĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thedhĂŠchrosha|thedhĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thedhĂŠchmusha|thedhĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thedhĂŠchyasha|thedhĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gothedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠchnkrosha|gothedhĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠchnkmusha|gothedhĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothedhĂŠchnkyasha|gothedhĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thodhfachasha|thodhfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thodhfachshĂ«sha|thodhfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thodhfachrosha|thodhfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thodhfachmusha|thodhfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thodhfachyasha|thodhfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothodhfachnkshĂ«sha|gothodhfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothodhfachnkrosha|gothodhfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothodhfachnkmusha|gothodhfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothodhfachnkyasha|gothodhfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
